title: Solana Payments for Digital Products Explained for Digital Creators That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you know the pain of being blocked by PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip. You can't sell your ebooks, courses, or templates online without getting shut down. But what if there was a way to bypass these restrictions and get paid in cryptocurrency without any fees or hassle? Introducing Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution, built on top of Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and NOWPayments, the crypto payment processor that doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts. This post will break down how it works and show you exactly how to take action and start selling your digital products today.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

This is not just another payment gateway or e-commerce platform. It's a custom-built solution designed specifically for digital creators in restricted countries who need to sell their products in cryptocurrency without any intermediaries. It's a game-changer for creators who want to maintain full control over their business and their earnings. With Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution, you can setup your own shop, accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, and deliver your products instantly to your customers.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Under the hood, Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution uses Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to integrate with NOWPayments, the crypto payment processor that doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts. This means you can create a shop on Unchained Commerce's platform and accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. The payment processing is fully automated, so you don't need to worry about handling transactions or dealing with sensitive customer data.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution is built for digital creators in restricted countries who want to sell their products in cryptocurrency without any intermediaries. This includes creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, and many others. It's also perfect for solo developers who want to build their own crypto-native digital product stores. With this solution, you can take control of your business and your earnings, and start selling your digital products today.
Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution is a fully automated payment processing solution that's fast, secure, and easy to use.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The components that make Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution work together include Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) for frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR generation, NOWPayments for crypto payment processing without KYC or buyer accounts, and Unchained Commerce's shop platform for setting up and managing your shop. These components work together seamlessly to provide a fully automated payment processing solution that's fast, secure, and easy to use.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

So, how do you take action and start using Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution? First, sign up for a shop account on Unchained Commerce's platform. Then, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) with NOWPayments to enable crypto payment processing. Finally, set up your shop and start selling your digital products. To get started, visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and follow the instructions to setup your shop. With this solution, you can start selling your digital products in cryptocurrency without any intermediaries or fees.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
With Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99), you can integrate your shop with NOWPayments to enable crypto payment processing without any intermediaries or fees.

If you're looking for a solution to sell your ebooks, courses, or templates online without getting shut down by PayPal or Stripe, you're not alone. With this solution, you can bypass restrictions and get paid in cryptocurrency without any fees or hassle. To learn more, check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your digital products with Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution, follow these steps: sign up for a shop account on Unchained Commerce's platform, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) with NOWPayments to enable crypto payment processing, set up your shop and add your products, and start selling your digital products in cryptocurrency without any intermediaries or fees. With this solution, you can take control of your business and your earnings, and start selling your digital products today.
Unchained Commerce's Solana payments solution is perfect for digital creators in restricted countries who want to sell their products in cryptocurrency without any intermediaries or fees.
